item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-01)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41072 Trending skills: 16057 Hot skills: 2134 Top All Time: find-skills (362396) Top Trending: sleek-design-mobile-apps (13162) Top Hot: memory-optimize (62)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): memory-optimize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 62 Source: kochetkov-ma/claude-brewcode Description: Optimizes Claude Code memory files in 4 interactive steps: removes duplicates, migrates rules to CLAUDE.md/rules files, compresses remaining entries, validates with cleanup. Typical reduction: 30-50% on token count.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use for website interaction, form automation, screenshots, scraping, and web app verification. Prefer snapshot refs (@e1, @e2) for deterministic actions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): security-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): webflow-designer-api
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 51 Source: 224-industries/webflow-skills Description: Work with the Webflow Designer API — either by building Designer Extensions (iframes inside the Webflow Designer) or by generating code snippets for the Designer API Playground. Covers element manipulation, styles, components, pages, variables, assets, error handling, CLI usage, and UI design patterns. Use when creating, debugging, or modifying Designer Extensions, OR when the user wants to run Designer API code in the Playground app.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): performance-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Optimize application performance for speed, efficiency, and scalability. Use when improving page load times, reducing bundle size, optimizing database queries, or fixing performance bottlenecks. Handles React optimization, lazy loading, caching, code splitting, and profiling.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): ohmg
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Ultimate multi-agent framework for Google Antigravity. Orchestrates specialized domain agents (PM, Frontend, Backend, Mobile, QA, Debug) via Serena Memory.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): looker-studio-bigquery
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and configure Looker Studio dashboards with BigQuery data sources. Use when creating analytics dashboards, connecting BigQuery to visualization tools, or optimizing data pipeline performance. Handles BigQuery connections, custom SQL queries, scheduled queries, dashboard design, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Fetches latest Vercel guidelines and checks files against all rules.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): vercel-deploy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly. Use when asked to "Deploy my app", "Deploy this to production", "Create a preview deployment", or "Push this live". No authentication required - returns preview URL and claimable deployment link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): agentic-development-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트와 협업하는 에이전틱 개발의 범용 원칙. 분해정복, 컨텍스트 관리, 추상화 수준 선택, 자동화 철학을 정의. 모든 AI 코딩 도구에 적용 가능.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): plannotator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Interactive plan and diff review for AI coding agents. Visual browser UI for annotating agent plans — approve or request changes with structured feedback. Supports code review, image annotation, and auto-save to Obsidian/Bear Notes.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): ui-component-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build reusable, maintainable UI components following modern design patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or building scalable frontend architectures. Handles React patterns, composition, prop design, TypeScript, and component best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure and manage development, staging, and production environments. Use when setting up environment variables, managing configurations, or separating environments. Handles .env files, config management, and environment-specific settings.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): user-guide-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear and helpful user guides and tutorials for end users. Use when creating onboarding docs, how-to guides, or FAQ pages. Handles user-focused documentation, screenshots, step-by-step instructions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): changelog-maintenance
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Maintain a clear and informative changelog for software releases. Use when documenting version changes, tracking features, or communicating updates to users. Handles semantic versioning, changelog formats, and release notes.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): web-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): code-refactoring
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Simplify and refactor code while preserving behavior, improving clarity, and reducing complexity. Use when simplifying complex code, removing duplication, or applying design patterns. Handles Extract Method, DRY principle, SOLID principles, behavior validation, and refactoring patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): jeo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: JEO — 통합 AI 에이전트 오케스트레이션 스킬. ralph+plannotator로 계획 수립, team/bmad로 실행, agent-browser로 브라우저 동작 검증, 작업 완료 후 worktree 자동 정리. Claude, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode 모두 지원. 설치: ralph, omc, omx, ohmg, bmad, plannotator, agent-browser.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): copilot-coding-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: GitHub Copilot Coding Agent 자동화. 이슈에 ai-copilot 라벨 부착 → GitHub Actions가 GraphQL로 Copilot에 자동 할당 → Copilot이 Draft PR 생성. 원클릭 이슈-to-PR 파이프라인.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): opencontext
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: OpenContext를 활용한 AI 에이전트 영구 메모리 및 컨텍스트 관리. 세션/레포/날짜 간 컨텍스트 유지, 결론 저장, 문서 검색 워크플로우 제공.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): responsive-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create responsive web designs that work across all devices and screen sizes. Use when building mobile-first layouts, implementing breakpoints, or optimizing for different viewports. Handles CSS Grid, Flexbox, media queries, viewport units, and responsive images.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Systematically debug code issues using proven methodologies. Use when encountering errors, unexpected behavior, or performance problems. Handles error analysis, root cause identification, debugging strategies, and fix verification.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): agentic-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 협업 개발의 핵심 원칙. 분해정복, 컨텍스트 관리, 추상화 수준 선택, 자동화 철학, 검증 회고를 정의. 모든 AI 에이전트 사용 시 최적의 협업 패턴 적용.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): parallel-task
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1199 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Execute plan files by launching multiple parallel subagents to complete tasks simultaneously. Triggers on explicit "/parallel-task" commands.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#48): planner
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 1198 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#49): context7
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 1198 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 API. Use PROACTIVELY when: (1) Working with ANY external library (React, Next.js, Supabase, etc.) (2) User asks about library APIs, patterns, or best practices (3) Implementing features that rely on third-party packages (4) Debugging library-specific issues (5) Need current documentation beyond training data cutoff (6) AND MOST IMPORTANTLY, when you are installing dependencies, libraries, or frameworks you should ALWAYS check the docs to see what the latest versions are. Do not rely on outdated knowledge. Always prefer this over guessing library APIs or using outdated knowledge.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1197 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (27 → 47): bmad-orchestrator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #27 Current rank: #47 Delta: -20 Installs: 51 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Orchestrates BMAD workflows for structured AI-driven development. Routes work across Analysis, Planning, Solutioning, and Implementation phases.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (28 → 49): git-workflow
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #28 Current rank: #49 Delta: -21 Installs: 51 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Manage Git workflows including commits, branches, merges, and collaboration. Use when working with Git repositories, creating commits, managing branches, or resolving conflicts.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (19 → 4): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #19 Current rank: #4 Delta: +15 Installs: 54 (prev 55) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (20 → 6): technical-writing
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #20 Current rank: #6 Delta: +14 Installs: 53 (prev 53) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (21 → 8): file-organization
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #21 Current rank: #8 Delta: +13 Installs: 52 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (22 → 17): log-analysis
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #22 Current rank: #17 Delta: +5 Installs: 51 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze application logs to identify errors, performance issues, and security anomalies. Use when debugging issues, monitoring system health, or investigating incidents. Handles various log formats including Apache, Nginx, application logs, and JSON logs.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (24 → 5): ralph
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #24 Current rank: #5 Delta: +19 Installs: 53 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Self-referential completion loop for AI CLI tools. Re-runs the agent on the same task across turns with fresh context each iteration, until the completion promise is detected or max iterations is reached.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (25 → 7): code-review
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #25 Current rank: #7 Delta: +18 Installs: 53 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct thorough, constructive code reviews for quality and security. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, identifying bugs, or auditing security. Handles best practices, SOLID principles, security vulnerabilities, performance analysis, and testing coverage.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (29 → 9): workflow-automation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #29 Current rank: #9 Delta: +20 Installs: 52 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate repetitive development tasks and workflows. Use when creating build scripts, automating deployments, or setting up development workflows. Handles npm scripts, Makefile, GitHub Actions workflows, and task automation.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (30 → 10): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #30 Current rank: #10 Delta: +20 Installs: 52 (prev 51) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (34 → 13): task-estimation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #13 Delta: +21 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 16): firebase-ai-logic
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #16 Delta: +20 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK. Handles Firebase AI SDK setup, prompt engineering, and AI-powered features.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (37 → 18): api-documentation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #37 Current rank: #18 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers. Use when documenting REST APIs, GraphQL schemas, or SDK methods. Handles OpenAPI/Swagger, interactive docs, examples, and API reference guides.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (38 → 19): agentic-workflow
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #38 Current rank: #19 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 실전 워크플로우와 생산성 기법. 명령어, 단축키, Git 통합, MCP 활용, 세션 관리 등 일상 개발 작업의 최적화 패턴 제공.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (39 → 20): vibe-kanban
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #39 Current rank: #20 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 코딩 에이전트를 시각적 Kanban 보드에서 관리. To Do→In Progress→Review→Done 흐름으로 병렬 에이전트 실행, git worktree 자동 격리, GitHub PR 자동 생성.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (40 → 21): npm-git-install
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #40 Current rank: #21 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Install npm packages directly from GitHub repositories using git URLs. Use when installing packages from private repos, specific branches, or unreleased versions not yet on npm registry.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (41 → 22): authentication-setup
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #41 Current rank: #22 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 23): sprint-retrospective
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #23 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (43 → 24): frontend-design-system
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #43 Current rank: #24 Delta: +19 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (45 → 27): testing-strategies
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #45 Current rank: #27 Delta: +18 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design comprehensive testing strategies for software quality assurance. Use when planning test coverage, implementing test pyramids, or setting up testing infrastructure. Handles unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, TDD, and testing best practices.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 15): pattern-detection
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #46 Current rank: #15 Delta: +31 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 12): pollinations-ai
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #12 Delta: +35 Installs: 52 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate and save images using Pollinations.ai's free, open-source API. No signup required. Supports URL-based generation, custom parameters (width, height, model, seed), and automatic file saving. Perfect for quick prototypes, marketing assets, and creative workflows.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (48 → 30): standup-meeting
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #48 Current rank: #30 Delta: +18 Installs: 51 (prev 50) Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct effective daily standup meetings for agile teams. Use when facilitating standups, tracking blockers, or improving team synchronization. Handles standup format, time management, and blocker resolution.
